Grade Name Select Grade @for (grade of filteredGradeList; track grade.GradeId) { {{ grade.GradeName }} } @if (responsibilitiesMstForm.get('GradeID')?.invalid && responsibilitiesMstForm.get('GradeID')?.touched) { Grade Name is required }
Division Name Select Division @for (division of filteredDivisionList; track division.DivisionId) { {{ division.DivisionName }} } @if (responsibilitiesMstForm.get('DivisionID')?.invalid && responsibilitiesMstForm.get('DivisionID')?.touched) { Division Name is required }
Designation Name Select Designation @for (designation of filteredDesignationList; track designation.DesignationId) { {{ designation.DesignationName }} } @if (responsibilitiesMstForm.get('DesignationID')?.invalid && responsibilitiesMstForm.get('DesignationID')?.touched) { Designation Name is required }
